name: mq-agent
title: mq-agent integration
summary: Profile for mq-agent tool discovery, safety class display, dry-run, and local repo workflows.
safety_notes: mq-agent should read safety metadata before allowing subprocess or write-capable calls.
Class A/B tools may be routed automatically when the user intent is clear.
Class C/D tools must remain approval-gated by the client.
mq-agent must not reimplement mq-mcp review logic, severity scoring, architecture reasoning, risk classification, semantic retrieval, review heuristics, or drift detection.
